module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with typed configuration that detects the host Platform, config-gated logging, remoc-backed messaging, an interactive streaming CLI, a Config-aware ToolRegistry that filters unsupported tools, and native Tool implementations that share ToolExecutionResult helper completion/cancellation while streaming outward ToolInvocationStatus values.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client-facing modules for interactive CLI, remoc-backed core session/task endpoints, executor dispatch, and a Config-aware tool registry that filters native and external tools by common config Platform before publishing previews.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent public surface for a minimal loop engine runtime with direct task-context state fields, remoc-backed frontdoor session/task endpoints, streamed chat response segments, model backend selection, model backend implementations, and a marker-free minimal agent binary main entrypoint that reads bind address from agent config and serves accepted clients.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared interfaces including typed TOML configuration with host Platform detection, runtime Marix path resolution, config-gated logging, directional chat request/response messages, shared channel errors, remoc session protocol messages, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.
